cells.source:
import numpy as np
arr1=[10,20,30,40,50]
arr2=[2,4,5,8,10]
a=np.array(arr1)
b=np.array(arr2)
print("Original arrays")
print(a)
print(b)
print("\nVertor addition")
print(a+b)
print("\nVertor subtraction")
print(a-b)
print("\nVertor multiplication")
print(a*b)
print("\nVertor division")
print(a/b)
print("\nVertor Dot product")
print(a.dot(b))
print("scalar multiplication")
sclr=5
print("Scalar value=",sclr)
print("array=",a)
print("result=",a*sclr)
def my_func(x,y):
    if x>y:
         return x-y
    else:
         return x+y
arr1=[10,4,20]
arr2=[2,3,30]
vec_func=np.vectorize(my_func)
print("array 1:",arr1)
print("array 2:",arr2)
print("result:",vec_func(arr1,arr2))
